If activity was not attempted, code reason:
07=Resident refused

88=Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns effective 10/01/2023
899 ROLL_INTRM_CD ROLL_INTRM_CD GG0170A5 Roll left and right (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the resident's ability to roll left and right during this assessment period plus two
